videos.title: 1986 - The Last Days of Patton - Beyond the battlefield: The curtain call of a military icon
videos.description:
General George S. Patton transitions from celebrated war leader to post-WWII administrator. Following an unexpected vehicle incident, he reflects on his legacy during recovery.

Original Title: The Last Days of Patton (1986) | AKA: Patton: The Final Days

⭐️ STARRING
George C. Scott - General George S. Patton
Eva Marie Saint - Beatrice Patton
Murray Hamilton - General Hobart Carver
Richard Dysart - General Omar Bradley
Ed Lauter - Colonel Paul Harkins
Kathryn Leigh Scott - Jean Gordon

🎬 CREW
Directed by Delbert Mann (Marty, Separate Tables)
Written by William Luce 
Period-accurate score by John Addison 

Release date: September 28, 1986 
Filming location: Bavaria, Germany & Los Angeles, California
Runtime: 97 minutes
